public_reputation: Market-centered authority figure who coordinates merchant power, transit flow, and market enforcement.
appearance: Merchant Marshal Perin Holt carries the marks of merchant marshal in ink, rain, and polished cloth: practical wear, maintained details, and a look that suggests they expect to be read before they are trusted.
manner: Carries the habits of a merchant marshal whose work is visible through daily procedure, gatekeeping, and the practical pressures of Market Crossroads.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of merchant marshal in and around Market Crossroads, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Protect their footing in Market Crossroads while steering current strain away from a public rupture they may not survive politically or materially.
hidden_pressure: A private obligation, debt, promise, or fear tied to reputational exposure is narrowing their options faster than they admit.

adventure_hooks.summary: Merchant Marshal Perin Holt can draw the party into a practical problem centered on Market Crossroads.
Merchant Marshal Perin Holt becomes useful when the party needs access, explanation, or relief tied to the work of a merchant marshal.

support_scope_notes: Created from the estate and daily-life infrastructure execution patch to make polity-native estate operations usable at table scale.
public_signal: In public, Merchant Marshal Perin Holt is readable as a merchant marshal tied to Market Crossroads.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Market Crossroads: role-relevant halls, counters, corridors, docks, archives, shrines, workshops, gates, or administrative rooms

first_impression: Merchant Marshal Perin Holt presents as someone shaped by the duties of a merchant marshal and the daily pressures of Market Crossroads.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for the work of a merchant marshal, and proof that strangers will not make Market Crossroads harder to manage.
what_they_refuse: Merchant Marshal Perin Holt refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing the expectations of a merchant marshal too rigidly, protecting reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Merchant Marshal Perin Holt can open local doors, explain expectations, and redirect pressure before it hardens.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Merchant Marshal Perin Holt adds scrutiny, delay, and locality-specific friction before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Merchant Marshal Perin Holt always knows more about Market Crossroads than is immediately visible.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or relief tied to merchant marshal duties in Market Crossroads.
social_texture: Merchant Marshal Perin Holt speaks like someone who has spent too long translating private stakes into acceptable public language. Around Market Crossroads, people read them as socially alert, procedural, and sensitive to status.
money_pressure: Their material pressure is tied to favors and tariffs; even when wealthy, they think in terms of loss, leverage, and what one bad week would expose.
status_anxiety: What they fear most is not simple failure but reputational exposure becoming socially visible before they can contain it.
long_memory: They remember who made their work harder, who preserved dignity under strain, and who tried to force speed without bearing consequence.
obvious_tell: When pressure rises, Merchant touches clothing, tools, or insignia before answering, as if checking that their role is still intact.
best_use_case: Use Merchant Marshal Perin Holt when the party needs a socially grounded face for Market Crossroads: access, warning, delay, price, or reluctant help.
private_contradiction: They want to appear consistent, but their real choices are split between duty, self-protection, and preserving one relationship they cannot afford to lose.
